item.title: First reading, referred to Transportation.
item.description: First reading, referred to Transportation.

item.title: 👍John Flanagan - Port of Seattle
item.description: John Flanagan signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Port of Seattle.

item.title: 👍Kati Durkin - Washington Federation of State Employees
item.description: Kati Durkin signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Federation of State Employees.

item.title: ❓💵Scott Hazlegrove - WA State Auto Dealers Association
item.description: Scott Hazlegrove signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent WA State Auto Dealers Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Justin Leighton - Washington State Transit Association
item.description: Justin Leighton signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Transit Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓💵Steven Ellis - Association of Washington Cities
item.description: Steven Ellis signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Cities. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Dana Debel - Delta Air Lines
item.description: Dana Debel signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Delta Air Lines.

item.title: 👍Mike Ennis - Pacific Northwest Business Aviation Association (PNBAA)
item.description: Mike Ennis signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Pacific Northwest Business Aviation Association (PNBAA).

item.title: ❓Jared Nieuwenhuis - City of Bellevue Councilmember
item.description: Jared Nieuwenhuis signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent City of Bellevue Councilmember.

item.title: 👍💵Bryce Yadon - Pacific Northwest Business Aviation Association (PNBAA)
item.description: Bryce Yadon signed up to testify Pro. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓Brad Schuster - Aircraft Owners and Pilots Association (AOPA) / Northwest Mountain Regional Manager
item.description: Brad Schuster signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Aircraft Owners and Pilots Association (AOPA) / Northwest Mountain Regional Manager.

item.title: 👍Jamie Hemenway - Elementary School Teacher
item.description: Jamie Hemenway signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Elementary School Teacher.

item.title: 👍Lee Lambert - Washington Bikes
item.description: Lee Lambert signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Bikes.

item.title: ❓Kenny Montilla - Turo
item.description: Kenny Montilla signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Turo.

item.title: ❓Nigel Herbig - Mayor, City of Kenmore
item.description: Nigel Herbig signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Mayor, City of Kenmore.

item.title: ❓Alethia Miller - Alaska Airlines
item.description: Alethia Miller signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Alaska Airlines.

item.title: 👍Robin Koskey - Puget Sound Regional Council
item.description: Robin Koskey signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Puget Sound Regional Council.

item.title: ❓💵Hanna Jones - Fife RV, plus several other local RV dealers
item.description: Hanna Jones signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Fife RV, plus several other local RV dealers. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓Jennifer Kammerzell - City of Tacoma
item.description: Jennifer Kammerzell signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent City of Tacoma.

item.title: 👍💵Jeremy Une - ATU 587
item.description: Jeremy Une signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent ATU 587. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Mandy Zylstra - Elementary School Teacher
item.description: Mandy Zylstra signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Elementary School Teacher.

item.title: Senate unveils bipartisan supplemental transportation budget prioritizing preservation and maintenance, job creation - Sen. Marko Liias
item.description: News article "Senate unveils bipartisan supplemental transportation budget prioritizing preservation and maintenance, job creation - Sen. Marko Liias" from Senate Democrats.

item.title: Unpopular aircraft tax taxis toward rollback in Olympia • Washington State Standard
item.description: News article "Unpopular aircraft tax taxis toward rollback in Olympia • Washington State Standard" from Washington State Standard.
